raw_data: Discipline refers to where AI is applied for
Data About (DATA SOURCE: sensor, design component(artifhact), natural language)
A distinct format or structure of input data- text, images, audio, video, or time series, each requiring different approaches for labeling and analysis.
Insudtrial Design/ Engineering design/ product design

Machine learning algorithms that use relatively simple architectures with few layers or parameters, typically requiring manual feature engineering. These include classical statistical and algorithmic approaches.
AI creates multiple design variations quickly to expand creative options
Including service design, Product service system, Cyber physical system,

Visual data, image labeling involvse tagging objects, defining regions, or classifying entire images to help models interpret visual input (i.e., Design artifacts, 3D models) (Key tasks: object detection, image classification, segmentation)

Deep neural network architectures specifically designed for processing and analyzing visual data, using multiple layers to automatically learn hierarchical feature representations from images or videos.
AI anticipates outcomes and simulates how dseigns might perform before implementation
Deep learning architectures designed for understanding, processing, and generating human language, capable of capturing complex linguistic patterns and semantic relationships.
AI evaluates design options against specific criteria to assist with objective design-making
Including more than two design disciplines
Activity detection, frame labeling, scene classification

Artificial intelligence models capable of generating new content (text, images, audio, etc.) by learning patterns from training data and creating novel outputs that resemble the original data - Examples: GANs, VAEs, Diffusion Models, smaller generative models like StyleGAN, Pix2Pixdistribution.
AI improves team communication and project management across design workflows.
IoT signals, financial data, medical monitoring

Large-scale generative models with billions of parameters, typically based on transformer architectures, capable of complex multi-modal generation and understanding across various domains.
- Examples: GPT-3/4, Claude, LLaMA, PaLM, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, Gemini
Knowledge augmentation + Knwoeldge generation -> sense making
Combining text, image, audio, or other formats for richer model context
Learning paradigm where agents learn optimal behavior through trial-and-error interactions with an environment, receiving rewards or penalties based on their actions.

Statistical and visualization techniques used to understand data characteristics, identify patterns, detect anomalies, and test hypotheses before applying formal modeling techniques. Not strictly AI but foundational for AI/ML workflows.
- Examples: Descriptive statistics, correlation analysis, data visualization (histograms, scatter plots, box plots), dimensionality reduction (PCA, t-SNE), clustering analysis, outlier detection

A multi-stage framework: (1) mathematical modeling of 3D form & color to extract combined appearance data; (2) neural recognition model to better capture emotional responses; (3) predictive model mapping appearance to emotion; (4) optimization model (Improved SPEA2) to simultaneously optimize form and color for multiple emotional criteria — validated via car design cases showing superior affective design performance and efficiency in Model I over Model II.

Intrinsically interpretable ANN with FANOVA-based decomposition to compute individual global sensitivity indices, followed by subset decomposition to obtain grouped indices; supports nonlinear, mixed (continuous/categorical) inputs without analytical or surrogate models; demonstrated on a programmable material system (PMS) with material/architecture/stimulus groups to derive design guidelines.

domain-knowledge-integrated designable data augmentation (DDA). Uses inverse generator to augment limited design data; applies transfer learning to predict virtual crash responses (~95% accuracy); aids in identifying critical design variables and deriving safe bumper design solutions.
NOVEL METHODOLOGY FOR REAL-TIME STRUCTURAL ANALYSIS ASSISTANCE IN CUSTOM PRODUCT DESIGN

Proposed a compiled FEA surrogate framework: parametric dataset generated via DOE + FEA, then trained ensemble regression models (e.g., Gradient Boosting, RF) to replace costly FEA in real time. Validated on a custom internal fixator design case, achieving accurate stress/deflection predictions and enabling interactive CAD feedback.

Uses BERT-based contextual embeddings to cluster feature mentions into sub-features; builds contextual word maps to interpret clusters; sentiment analysis per sub-feature provides fine-grained customer satisfaction insights.

Introduces a Design Support System (DesSS) that uses ML algorithms—Decision Trees, KNN, NCFS—for predicting machine specifications (geometry, performance) from available heterogeneous input. Validated on real datasets; benefits include faster decision-making, knowledge conservation, reduced man-hours, high accuracy.

integrates user activity logs from AutoCAD (via custom plugin) and LOTSIA PDM, constructs unified user behavior models, and applies Markov chain analysis to detect typical/atypical workflows. Prototype system visualizes workflows for efficiency monitoring.

Should “Markov chain analysis” be strictly coded as Traditional ML, or is it better placed under Exploratory data analysis since it’s primarily used for behavior pattern discovery rather than prediction?
Computers as co-creative assistants. A comparative study on the use of text-to-image AI models for computer aided conceptual design
Insudtrial Design/ Engineering design/ product design

Comparative practical study between Shape Grammars and Stable Diffusion for supporting formal exploration in conceptual design. Highlights how text-to-image models offer faster, broader creative exploration and can be integrated into existing design methods.

Introduces a self-learning agent that uses a deep policy network and novel tree-search algorithm to discover generative strategies in design spaces without any prior data; demonstrates zero-shot strategy generalization across unseen boundary conditions and multiple design tasks.

a margin-based GRNN that autonomously learns upper/lower design boundaries and identifies outliers in industrial design datasets. It compares GRNN with HMM, Parzen, clustering, and k-NN. Demonstrated improved detection of design anomalies and guidance for permissible parameter ranges.

Framework encodes design knowledge into graph models by combining dataset-driven variable selection with functional and dimensional homogeneity checks; evaluates model fidelity by comparing simplified graph models against high-fidelity reference models. Case study: ball-in-fluid system.
ChatGPT and finetuned BERT: A comparative study for developing intelligent design support systems

Compares fine-tuned BERT and ChatGPT on classification and generation tasks. ChatGPT performs comparably in classification (sentence-level), performs better with few-shot prompting, and shows potential in data labeling, knowledge transfer, and generation with minimal guidance.

Insudtrial Design/ Engineering design/ product design

Developed a tool (GAME‑ON) using a case-based knowledge graph integrated with reinforcement learning. Based on literature review of 54 studies and an industrial survey (146 responses), it integrates Generative AI to reduce ideation time—providing automated recommendations for materials and manufacturing. Built using a Double Diamond Design Process. Validated via proof-of-concept with improved aesthetic appeal and reduced ideation time.

Proposed an iterative framework: synthetic dataset → 3DGAN training → FEA evaluation → feedback into GAN to enhance performance (tested on aerospace joint component; achieved ~20% average safety factor improvement and narrowed design variation range)

Behavioral cloning is used to transfer human design strategies to AI agents with high sample efficiency; demonstrates AI’s ability to replicate human design behavior.

Utilizes behavioral cloning—an imitation learning algorithm—to train on human designer decision data gathered in controlled experiments. The study compares two sequence learning methods for predicting and replicating human design actions, showing behavioral cloning converges to design solutions with fewer explored states compared to RL alternatives.

2024 IEEE 7TH INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON INDUSTRIAL CYBER-PHYSICAL SYSTEMS, ICPS 2024
Insudtrial Design/ Engineering design/ product design

The approach encodes Roth’s 30 functions as planning actions, models input/output flows as planning states, and applies a POP algorithm to automatically create functional decompositions. Validated with examples (coffee maker, ATM).

COMPUTER METHODS IN APPLIED MECHANICS AND ENGINEERING
Insudtrial Design/ Engineering design/ product design

The framework decouples ML training from topology optimization: a CNN-based surrogate learns offline from FEA-based topology solutions, enabling up to 30× acceleration without sacrificing accuracy. Demonstrated on varying geometries and conditions, showing strong generalization.
Classifying design-level requirements using machine learning for a recommender of interaction design patterns
Silva-Rodriguez, Viridiana; Edith Nava-Munoz, Sandra; Castro, Luis A.; Martinez-Perez, Francisco E.; Perez-Gonzalez, Hector G.; Torres-Reyes, Francisco
Evaluation of UI design (user response time-based)

The study tests ML's ability to evaluate UI designs within defined software boundaries. The model can rank accessible designs and evaluate the accessibility of new designs based on user response times to quiz interfaces.  (CNNs, VGG19, ResNet…)
User Experience Design Professionals' Perceptions of Generative Artificial Intelligence
Li, Jie; Cao, Hancheng; Lin, Laura; Hou, Youyang; Zhu, Ruihao; El Ali, Abdallah
PROCEEDINGS OF THE 2024 CHI CONFERENCE ON HUMAN FACTORS IN COMPUTING SYTEMS, CHI 2024
Developing emotion recognition systems with better user interaction

The study presents CBB-GAN-SR model that integrates self-attention and residual neural networks for EEG-based emotion recognition. The model achieves 80.55% accuracy on arousal dimension in DEAP dataset.
A Novel User Emotional Interaction Design Model Using Long and Short-Term Memory Networks and Deep Learning
Chen, Xiang; Huang, Rubing; Li, Xin; Xiao, Lei; Zhou, Ming; Zhang, Linghao
The study proposes ILSTM (Improved LSTM) with self-attention for speech emotion recognition. Achieves 65.29% accuracy on Emo-DB and 74.17% on CASIA dataset for 7 emotion categories
Exploring the Potential of Large Language Models in Radiological Imaging Systems: Improving User Interface Design and Functional Capabilities
Zhang, Luyao; Shu, Jianhua; Hu, Jili; Li, Fangfang; He, Junjun; Wang, Peng; Shen, Yiqing

The study presents ChatUI-RIS prototype that uses LLM as interface, controller, and executor. 26 medical students tested the system, showing reduced learning time and improved operational efficiency compared to traditional GUI.

Yen, Meng-Hua; Tian, Shang-Lin; Lin, Yan-Ting; Yang, Cheng-Wei; Chen, Chi-Chun
The study aimed to predict fuel consumption level. Is it related to design work directly?
Optimizing HMI for Intelligent Electric Vehicles Using BCI and Deep Neural Networks with Genetic Algorithms
Jin, Xinmin; Teng, Jian; Lee, Shaw-mung

The study uses DNN-GA to optimize HMI layouts based on EEG attention levels (e-Sense). Achieved MSE of 0.22 and MAE of 0.31, outperforming SVMs-GA, DT-GA, and PSO-GA models. AR was used to simulate realistic driving conditions.
Empirical Evidence on Conversational Control of GUI in Semantic Automation

Weidele, Daniel Karl I.; Martino, Mauro; Valente, Abel N.; Rossiello, Gaetano; Strobelt, Hendrik; Franke, Loraine; Alvero, Kathryn; Misko, Shayenna; Auer, Robin; Bagchi, Sugato; Mihindukulasooriya, Nandana; Chowdhury, Faisal; Bramble, Gregory; Samulowitz, Horst; Gliozzo, Alfio; Amini, Lisa
PROCEEDINGS OF 2024 29TH ANNUAL CONFERENCE ON INTELLIGENT USER INTERFACES, IUI 2024

The study uses fine-tuned FLAN-T5 with Semantic Bottlenecks (JSON-to-JSON) for UI control. 11 business analysts tested the system, showing 36.4-100% task success rates. AI trust increased significantly from 3.36 to 4.00 (p<0.02) after use.
APPLICATION OF AR VIRTUAL IMPLANTATION TECHNOLOGY BASED ON DEEP LEARNING AND EMOTIONAL TECHNOLOGY IN THE CREATION OF INTERACTIVE PICTURE BOOKS
Liu, Sidan; Peng, Peng; Cao, Lei

The study uses VGGNet to analyze emotions in AR picture book images based on Donald Norman's three-level emotional design theory. Achieved 61.02% single-label accuracy for emotion classification across 11 emotion categories. 2048 images covering various product categories were labeled by design professionals.
Society sync - Digitalize society management systems with artificial intelligence technologies
Thacker, Mayank; Shah, Lay; Shah, Manan

The study develops a housing society management system with 3 modules (Secretary, Watchman, Resident apps). Uses OCR for vehicle number plate recognition and face recognition for visitor management. 500-1000 user feedback analyzed to identify pain points. Improved security, efficiency, and transparency compared to traditional manual methods.
AN EEG-BASED EMOTION RECOGNITION MODEL USING AN INTERACTION DESIGN FRAMEWORK AND DEEP LEARNING
Wang, Li; Go, Jungwook; Chen, Xiang
JOURNAL OF MECHANICS IN MEDICINE AND BIOLOGY

The study develops CBB-GAN-SR model combining self-attention and residual networks. Replaced GAN discriminator with autoencoder. Achieved 80.55% accuracy (arousal) and 79.94% (valence) on DEAP dataset. Emphasizes interaction design framework for improved user experience and emotional feedback
The Application of Deep Learning for the Evaluation of User Interfaces
Keselj, Ana; Milicevic, Mario; Zubrinic, Krunoslav; Car, Zeljka

Study uses multi-channel ensemble CNN and Xception-based ensemble to predict user performance. 338 participants, 4448 responses collected. Best model achieved MAE 281.5ms, RMSE 347.5ms. Can rank new UI designs by predicted efficiency. Focus on layout, color, font, and font size variations.
